## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or MCP Inspector output if relevant.

## Environment

- `trilium-fastmcp` version or commit: <!-- e.g. v0.1.0 or commit hash -->
- Trilium version: <!-- e.g. 0.91.6 -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.13.1 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 15.1, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- Running via: <!-- Docker / uv / other -->
- MCP client: <!-- e.g. Claude Code, Claude Desktop, MCP Inspector -->

## Relevant configuration

Redact any tokens or URLs. Indicate whether `UPDATING_DISABLED` / `DELETING_DISABLED` / `MCP_AUTH_TOKEN` are set.

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — logs, screenshots, related issues.
